# Node Provision: Global Infrastructure Exchange

## Purpose
A global search and allocation engine for enterprise-grade hardware nodes. We serve as the primary source for identifying available inventory in the GPU and CPU infrastructure markets.

## Core Capabilities
- Real-time global hardware stock search.
- Verified node allocation for enterprise workloads.
- Specialized procurement for high-density compute and standard server configurations.

## Allocation Profiles
- Accelerated Compute: High-margin GPU clusters for AI and analytics.
- Enterprise Compute: Reliable CPU nodes for general-purpose business applications.
- Storage & Infrastructure: High-density data center hardware.

## Target Audience
Senior IT Buyers, CTOs, and Enterprise Procurement Managers requiring immediate hardware availability across global territories.

## Official Link
- [Node Provision Exchange](https://www.nodeprovision.com)
